trial_type.Description: Idea Diversity event category combining association number and same/different context.

trial.Description: Trial number from the source timing table.

association_number.Description: Association number within trial from the source timing table.

context.Description: Source context code; S denotes same-context and D denotes different-context trials.

cue.Description: Cue word from the source timing table.

fix_onset.Description: Fixation onset from the source timing table.

fix_duration.Description: Fixation duration from the source timing table.

prompt_onset.Description: Prompt onset from the source timing table.

prompt_duration.Description: Prompt duration from the source timing table.

speak_onset.Description: Speaking onset from the source timing table.

speak_duration.Description: Speaking duration from the source timing table.
